g.text: Though poorly understood, the Abnormal Briefcase
reliably performs all of the same functions of the
Normal Briefcase, and boasts an incredible track
record. Buttressed with chitinous plating and dim
sentience, any time after you claim any rewards for
the capture of an Anomaly you must feed it. Either
with steak, an Anomaly apprehended by this
briefcase, or speciﬁc praise. You may activate its
hidden ability by speaking a passphrase: when you
fail to do so, it provides the Anomaly a secure cell.
There is no hidden backdoor it can use to escape
from the Vault without leaving some sort of a trace.
You may trigger this ability at any time, even in
response to actions that require the Anomaly to have
been in the Vault but only once in your career. When
you do, it is considered Escaped for all game effects
moving forward. The Anomaly’s unique resonance
pattern means that its escape cannot be avoided; it
will be traced to you.
It also makes a stylish pet for Agents who are adept
at keeping Loose Ends low. However, because it is
not real, you receive 1Demerit for reading this page
and should alert your General Manager appropriately.
K1
